# @nqlib/nqui

> React component library with Tailwind v4, Radix primitives, and LLM-native docs.

## Agent skill

- [Consumer skill](/.well-known/agent-skills/nqui/SKILL.md) — install, CSS, component selection, composition
- [Skill index](/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json)

## Install

- [README](https://github.com/nqlib/nqui/blob/main/README.md)
- [INSTALLATION.md](https://github.com/nqlib/nqui/blob/main/INSTALLATION.md)

## Component API

Read from npm package after install:

```
node_modules/@nqlib/nqui/docs/components/README.md
node_modules/@nqlib/nqui/docs/components/nqui-<name>.md
```

Or copy skills locally:

```bash
npx @nqlib/nqui init-skills
```

## Skills bundle

```
node_modules/@nqlib/nqui/docs/nqui-skills/SKILL.md
```

Sub-skills: nqui-components, nqui-design-system, nqui-install, nqui-composition, impeccable, /audit, /polish, …

## Contributing (maintainers only)

- [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/nqlib/nqui/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [docs/index.md](https://github.com/nqlib/nqui/blob/main/docs/index.md)
